title: E Commerce Main Image Classical Literature Themed Phone
sourceTitle: E Commerce Main Image Classical Literature Themed Phone Case

imagePrompts.prompt: {argument name="character" default="Wang Xifeng"} co-branded phone case, with phoenix crown and traditional bridal robe motif in gold wire relief, and a gold-stamped phoenix pattern on the back.
imagePrompts.title: E Commerce Main Image Classical Literature Themed Phone Case

prompt: {argument name="character" default="Wang Xifeng"} co-branded phone case, with phoenix crown and traditional bridal robe motif in gold wire relief, and a gold-stamped phoenix pattern on the back.
originalPrompt: {argument name="character" default="Wang Xifeng"} co-branded phone case, with phoenix crown and traditional bridal robe motif in gold wire relief, and a gold-stamped phoenix pattern on the back.

promptTranslations.zh: {argument name="character" default="王熙凤"} 联名款手机壳，采用金丝浮雕工艺呈现凤冠与传统婚服纹样，背面带有金印凤凰图案。
promptTranslations.fr: Coque de téléphone co-marquée {argument name="character" default="Wang Xifeng"}, avec un motif de couronne de phénix et de robe de mariée traditionnelle en relief de fil d'or, et un motif de phénix estampé à l'or sur le dos.
promptTranslations.ru: {argument name="character" default="Ван Сифэн"} чехол для телефона из коллаборации, украшенный рельефным золотым шитьем с мотивом традиционной свадебной короны феникса и подвенечного наряда, с тисненным золотом узором феникса на задней панели.
promptTranslations.pt: Capa de celular co-branded de {argument name="character" default="Wang Xifeng"}, com motivo de coroa de fênix e robe de noiva tradicional em relevo de fio de ouro, e um padrão de fênix estampado em ouro na parte traseira.
promptTranslations.ja: {argument name="character" default="王熙鳳"} コラボレーションスマホケース。鳳冠霞帔（ほうかんかひ）の伝統的な婚礼衣装のモチーフを金糸のレリーフで表現し、背面には金箔押しの鳳凰模様をあしらったデザイン。
promptTranslations.ko: {argument name="character" default="왕희봉"} 콜라보레이션 폰 케이스. 금사 릴리프 기법으로 표현된 봉관(phoenix crown)과 전통 혼례복 모티프가 특징이며, 뒷면에는 금박 봉황 패턴이 새겨져 있습니다.
